name: pumpkin pie
instructions:
Preheat the oven to 425°F (218°C).

Mix the filling
In a bowl, combine:

pumpkin purée

sugar

cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, and salt.

Add the eggs and mix well.

Stir in the milk until the mixture is smooth.

Pour the filling into the pie crust.

Bake for 15 minutes at 425°F.

Lower the oven to 350°F (177°C) and bake 35–40 more minutes.

The pie is done when a knife in the center comes out mostly clean.

Let it cool for about 2 hours before slicing.
